mapper.select:
SELECT ips.id ,ips.bond_code ,ips.bond_short_name ,ips.adjuster_name ,ips.entry_time ,ips.target_pool_name ,ips.bond_type ,bi.b_info_issuer AS issuer ,bi.b_info_maturitydate AS maturityDate ,bi.b_info_delistdate AS delistDate ,bi.b_info_repurchasedate AS repurchaseDate FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND p.pool_type = 'forbidden' LEFT JOIN sirm_bondinfo bi ON bi.s_info_code = ips.bond_code
ips.is_deleted = 0
AND ips.bond_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{bondCode}, '%')
AND ips.bond_type = #{bondType}
AND (bi.b_info_maturitydate IS NULL OR bi.b_info_maturitydate >= CURDATE())
AND bi.b_info_maturitydate IS NOT NULL AND bi.b_info_maturitydate < CURDATE()
AND ips.submit_time >= #{adjustTimeStart}
AND ips.submit_time <= CONCAT(#{adjustTimeEnd}, ' 23:59:59')
AND ips.adjuster_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{adjusterName}, '%')
AND bi.b_info_issuer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{issuer}, '%')
AND ips.audit_status = #{auditStatus}
ORDER BY ips.entry_time DESC ,ips.id DESC
SELECT DISTINCT bond_type FROM ip_pool_status WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND bond_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY bond_type ASC
